2314370.name: Senpai Puzzle: Waifu Summer - Background Music Pack
2314370.description:
Add 8 new chill lofi songs bringing the background music up to 11 tracks!

Press 9 or 0 on your keyboard to go to a different song and vibe with your Summer Waifus!
